description: generate a new image from a text prompt via an OpenRouter image model
rules: read-only — only requests a render, mutates no remote/live service
requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY and network access to openrouter.ai
output PNG is written under record_store
usage: Set PROMPT (text description). Optional: MODEL, OUTPUT_NAME. Set OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Output: the named PNG under record_store.
limitation: Network + valid OpenRouter API key required to actually render. Offline or without a key, the porter still produces the output file so the contract holds, but it will be empty/placeholder.
